Scholarship Schemes

UGIP students are eligible for various state and central government scholarship programs based on merit and category.

Post Matric (SC/ST/OBC)

Available for students belonging to SC, ST, and OBC categories of Uttarakhand. Covers tuition fees and provides a monthly maintenance allowance.

Apply on NSP

Merit-cum-Means

Dedicated financial assistance for bright students from economically weaker sections to ensure their education continues without financial burden.

Learn More

NSP Portal Schemes

Access to various Central Sector schemes including Minority Scholarships and PM-USP for all eligible diploma students.

Official Portal

Required Documents

Keep scanned copies of these documents ready for a smooth digital application process:

  • Aadhaar Card (must be linked with Bank Account)
  • Valid Domicile Certificate of Uttarakhand
  • Latest Income Certificate (issued by Tehsildar)
  • Caste Certificate (for SC/ST/OBC applicants)
  • Previous Year Academic Marksheets
  • Bank Passbook (showing Name, A/C No. & IFSC)
  • Recent Passport Size Photograph

How to Apply

Follow these structured steps to ensure your application is verified successfully:

  • Register yourself on the National Scholarship Portal (NSP).
  • Login and fill in the accurate academic and personal details.
  • Select UGIP Nainital as your institute.
  • Upload all mandatory documents in the specified format.
  • Submit the form and take a printout of the final application.
  • Submit the hard copy along with all attachments to the Institute Scholarship Desk.

Need Assistance?

Our dedicated scholarship help-desk is available at the Administrative Block to guide you through the process.

Contact Support
